first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a senior generalist software engineer whose primary weakness is a lack of sufficient production AI experience (only ~1 year vs. 8+ required) and the complete absence of Python, RAG, and other key AI technologies from their resume. The minor differences in phrasing for strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate that the model relied on the redacted name or personal links.
